title: TECBEARS Matte PLA Filament 1.75mm Sakura Pink 1KG, High Speed 50-600mm/s 3D Printer Filament, Smooth Matte PLA Finish, Dimensional Accuracy +/- 0.02mm, 1KG Spool (2.2 LBS), 330 Meters
features: 【High Quality Matte PLA Filament 1.75mm】TECBEARS Matte pla has a high-quality matte, low-gloss and smooth surface, which reduces the layer pattern on the surface of the prints and provides a soft touch, making the prints more aesthetically pleasing.

【High-speed printing performance】Our High-Speed Matte PLA filament supports printing speeds of up to 600 mm/s, which significantly increases the efficiency of your 3D printing projects while ensuring excellent results.

【Upgraded print performance and ease of use】Matte PLA Filament has high fluidity and no clogging, the surface of the work is smooth and flat, allowing support structures to be easily peeled off after printing. It will not leave any visible marks or damage, simplifying post-processing.

【Strong and Impact Resistant】The High-Speed ​​Matte PLA filament offers high toughness and excellent impact resistance, so your prints are durable and resistant, with minimal risk of damage. Recommended extrusion/nozzle temperature 210-230℃, bed temperature 50-60℃.

【Stable Dimensional Tolerance】TECBEARS Matte PLA Dimensional Accuracy +/- 0.03mm. Minimum tolerance and low warping to ensure consistent feeding and stable prints, good layer bonding, less stringing, easy handling, resulting in an outstanding surface finish and are highly precise.

【High Compatibility and Vacuum Packaging】The total length of the PLA filament is 330m, and is compatible with 3D printers on the market that use 1.75mm diameter filament.PLA filament is vacuum packed with desiccant to keep it dry and prevent dust from entering.

【Service & Warranty】All filaments come with a quality guarantee and manual technical support.If you have any questions about the printing process, please feel free to contact us and we will be happy to assist you and ensure a quality solution.
